home.hero_description: Nautas is an Argentine association dedicated to bridging the gap between scientific exploration, artistic expression, and human consciousness.
home.pillar_art_desc: Creative expressions that expand the boundaries of perception and connect with the essential beauty of existence.
home.pillar_science_desc: Rigorous research that illuminates the mysteries of the cosmos and our place within the web of life.
home.pillar_consciousness_desc: Exploration of the human spirit and collective awakening toward a new way of inhabiting the planet.
home.vision_quote: "To observe is to participate. We are the universe experiencing itself through the lens of science and the soul."
home.newsletter_desc: Subscribe to our newsletter for monthly celestial logs, scientific breakthroughs, and invitations to exclusive events.

institutional.hero_title: A shared vessel, a common destiny.
institutional.mission_text_1: NAUTAS is a civil, public-benefit, non-profit entity whose social purpose is the promotion and dissemination of content across three main areas: art, science, and research on the human spirit and consciousness.
institutional.mission_text_2: The vocation of its members is to foster the communication of ideas and the development of activities that promote social interaction and the integration of vast cultural diversity.
institutional.mission_text_3: Its founding premises include the study and application of different forms of knowledge aimed at harmonious coexistence and the best use of natural resources. This implies the transmission of knowledge and concrete practices suited to the social reality of our time.
institutional.mission_text_4: Nautas promotes the development of new expressions that serve to enhance the health of society, the environment, communication, personal relationships, and the arts across the continent and the world.
institutional.mission_text_5: We invite you to participate actively and wholeheartedly in our proposals.
institutional.vision_text_1: The purpose of Nautas is not "defined" — it is not something to reach but something to build together. For a new paradigm must emerge precisely as something new, different from what has been known so far.
institutional.vision_text_2: In this sense, the purpose that unites us is to create, as if composing a work of art, a multi-participatory vision across several planes or creative dimensions — one that can reflect the vitality and intelligence that arise when we connect with the truth of the heart and move through the world from there.
institutional.vision_text_3: More than instructing or teaching, what calls us is to make available to the Spanish-speaking public tools that enable participation and free, interactive communication to create a truly new way of relating to one another.
institutional.vision_quote: "We sail aboard the same vessel: planet Earth. Our destiny is linked to the design of its Spirit."
institutional.team_desc: A multidisciplinary crew united by the same orbit.
institutional.cta_desc: Write to us, join the team, or explore our projects.

contact.form_success: Message sent! We'll get back to you soon.

footer.tagline: Dedicated to the integration of scientific truth and human consciousness.
